languages.text: "Протокол..." {n}Альва-9 проглатывает конец фразы, молча вглядывается в собственную почерневшую руку. Зажатый в оплавленных пальцах ксеноартефакт продолжает низко гудеть. Техножрица морщится и с громкой бинарной трелью бросает предмет вам.{/n}

"Protocol—" {n}Alva-9 swallows the end of the sentence, staring at her blackened hand. The xeno-artefact clutched in her melted fingers continues to emit a low hum. The Tech-Priest scowls and, with a loud binharic trill, tosses the object to you.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Протокол..." {n}Альва-9 проглатывает конец фразы, молча вглядывается в собственную почерневшую руку. Зажатый в оплавленных пальцах ксеноартефакт продолжает низко гудеть. Техножрица морщится и с громкой бинарной трелью бросает предмет вам.{/n}

"Protocol—" {n}Alva-9 swallows the end of the sentence, staring at her blackened hand. The xeno-artefact clutched in her melted fingers continues to emit a low hum. The Tech-Priest scowls and, with a loud binharic trill, tosses the object to you.{/n}

"Protocol—" {n}Alva-9 swallows the end of the sentence, staring at her blackened hand. The xeno-artefact clutched in her melted fingers continues to emit a low hum. The Tech-Priest scowls and, with a loud binharic trill, tosses the object to you.{/n}

languages.text: 「プロトコル…」{n}アルバ-9は、黒くなった手をじっと見つめながら、その言葉を飲み込んだ。溶けた指で握られていた異星由来のartefactは、低い唸り声を立て続けている。テクプリストは眉をひそめ、大きなビナリックの鳴き声と共に、その物体をお前に投げつけた。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Protocol—" {n}Alva-9 swallows the end of the sentence, staring at her blackened hand. The xeno-artefact clutched in her melted fingers continues to emit a low hum. The Tech-Priest scowls and, with a loud binharic trill, tosses the object to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「プロトコル…」{n}アルバ-9は、黒くなった手をじっと見つめながら、その言葉を飲み込んだ。溶けた指で握られていた異星由来のartefactは、低い唸り声を立て続けている。テクプリストは眉をひそめ、大きなビナリックの鳴き声と共に、その物体をお前に投げつけた。{/n}

languages.text: «El protoco...». {n}Alva-9 se traga la frase y mira su mano ennegrecida. El xenoartefacto que lleva en sus dedos fundidos sigue zumbando. La tecnosacerdotisa hace un gesto desdeñoso y, con un sonoro trino binario, te tira el objeto.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Protocol—" {n}Alva-9 swallows the end of the sentence, staring at her blackened hand. The xeno-artefact clutched in her melted fingers continues to emit a low hum. The Tech-Priest scowls and, with a loud binharic trill, tosses the object to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «El protoco...». {n}Alva-9 se traga la frase y mira su mano ennegrecida. El xenoartefacto que lleva en sus dedos fundidos sigue zumbando. La tecnosacerdotisa hace un gesto desdeñoso y, con un sonoro trino binario, te tira el objeto.{/n}

languages.text: “协议——”{n}阿尔瓦-9把话咽了回去，死盯着自己焦黑的手。那异形造物仍在她熔烂的指间嗡鸣低响。技术神甫皱紧眉头，伴随着一声响亮的二进制颤音，猛地把东西扔给了你。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Protocol—" {n}Alva-9 swallows the end of the sentence, staring at her blackened hand. The xeno-artefact clutched in her melted fingers continues to emit a low hum. The Tech-Priest scowls and, with a loud binharic trill, tosses the object to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “协议——”{n}阿尔瓦-9把话咽了回去，死盯着自己焦黑的手。那异形造物仍在她熔烂的指间嗡鸣低响。技术神甫皱紧眉头，伴随着一声响亮的二进制颤音，猛地把东西扔给了你。{/n}

languages.text: "Protokoll ..."{n}Alva-9 würgt den Rest des Satzes hinunter und starrt auf ihre geschwärzte Hand. Das Xeno-Artefakt zwischen ihren geschmolzenen Fingern summt immer noch leise. Die Techpriesterin verzieht das Gesicht und wirft dir das Objekt mit einem lauten binhärischen Trillern zu.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Protocol—" {n}Alva-9 swallows the end of the sentence, staring at her blackened hand. The xeno-artefact clutched in her melted fingers continues to emit a low hum. The Tech-Priest scowls and, with a loud binharic trill, tosses the object to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Protokoll ..."{n}Alva-9 würgt den Rest des Satzes hinunter und starrt auf ihre geschwärzte Hand. Das Xeno-Artefakt zwischen ihren geschmolzenen Fingern summt immer noch leise. Die Techpriesterin verzieht das Gesicht und wirft dir das Objekt mit einem lauten binhärischen Trillern zu.{/n}

languages.text: "Protokol..." {n}Alva-9, kararmış eline bakarak cümlenin sonunu yutuyor. Erimiş parmakları arasında sıkıca tuttuğu zeno eseri, alçak bir uğultu yaymaya devam ediyor. Tekno Rahip, kaşlarını çatıyor ve yüksek sesli bir ikilidil nağmeyle nesneyi sana fırlatıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Protocol—" {n}Alva-9 swallows the end of the sentence, staring at her blackened hand. The xeno-artefact clutched in her melted fingers continues to emit a low hum. The Tech-Priest scowls and, with a loud binharic trill, tosses the object to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Protokol..." {n}Alva-9, kararmış eline bakarak cümlenin sonunu yutuyor. Erimiş parmakları arasında sıkıca tuttuğu zeno eseri, alçak bir uğultu yaymaya devam ediyor. Tekno Rahip, kaşlarını çatıyor ve yüksek sesli bir ikilidil nağmeyle nesneyi sana fırlatıyor.{/n}

languages.text: « Le protocole… » {n}commence Alva-9 avant de s'interrompre, le regard rivé sur sa main noircie. L'artefact maintenu entre ses doigts fondus continue d'émettre un faible bourdonnement. La technoprêtresse fronce les sourcils, puis vous lance l'objet en produisant un petit trille binhaire.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Protocol—" {n}Alva-9 swallows the end of the sentence, staring at her blackened hand. The xeno-artefact clutched in her melted fingers continues to emit a low hum. The Tech-Priest scowls and, with a loud binharic trill, tosses the object to you.{/n}

L'artefact maintenu entre ses doigts fondus continue d'émettre un faible bourdonnement. La technoprêtresse fronce les sourcils, puis vous lance l'objet en produisant un petit trille binhaire.{/n}
